ai_output.final_answer:
Based on the search results provided, here is an overview of **Cluaiz** and its products:

### What is Cluaiz.com?
The website `https://cluaiz.com` serves as the official home for **Cluaiz**, a high-performance, hardware-agnostic AI inference engine. The site focuses on providing tools for running advanced open-source models locally with "industrial-grade precision" and complete privacy. It emphasizes bypassing legacy software layers (like hypervisors and container containers) to connect directly with GPU cores via APIs such as CUDA, Metal, and Vulkan.

### Products Built by Cluaiz Technologies
According to the search results, Cluaiz builds a **Local AI Inference Engine & Orchestrator**. Key features include:

*   **Hardware Agnostic Runtime:** It is designed to run on various hardware architectures including AMD, Intel, Apple Silicon (M-series), ARM, and NVIDIA GPUs.
*   **System-Level Optimization:** The engine minimizes software overheads by utilizing compute APIs directly, ensuring maximum performance for local workstations ranging from consumer laptops to private servers.
*   **Sovereign Neural Runtime:** It allows users to deploy AI models natively with a single command, offering complete privacy since inference happens locally without needing an external cloud connection.
*   **Native Execution:** Built in Rust and available as a standalone engine (e.g., `cluaiz` binary) that can be installed via PowerShell or similar shell commands for rapid deployment.
[DONE]

search_extension_payload.snippet: Cluaiz (pronounced klueez) is a high-performance, hardware-agnostic AI engine built for the next era of local inference.
search_extension_payload.title: Privacy Protocol - Cluaiz

search_extension_payload.snippet: # Cluaiz Local AI Inference Engine. ## From Local Workstations to Private Servers—Maximum Performance with Zero Middleware Overheads. Cluaiz bridges the gap between hardware capability and AI execution. By bypassing legacy hypervisors, container layers, and API bottlenecks, our engine connects directly with your hardware. Whether running models on a consumer laptop or orchestrating a distributed server, Cluaiz ensures efficiency, reliability, and precision. Cluaiz is a system-level runtime engine that minimizes software overheads by utilizing GPU cores through compute APIs (CUDA, Metal, Vulkan). For distributed environments, it features a peer-to-peer connection flow for memory clustering across multiple hardware sources over a local network. Direct communication with physical cores eliminates dynamic interpreter taxes and heavy container overhead, enabling immediate native hardware execution. The engine dynamically fuses and compiles the computational graph straight into native GPU compute shaders at runtime, mapping perfectly to your hardware core configuration. We are committed to establishing a trusted, transparent, and high-performance network, bridging the gap between local optimization and enterprise standards.
search_extension_payload.title: About | Cluaiz Local AI

search_extension_payload.snippet: Download Cluaiz. Experience the raw power of a Rust-built local inference engine. Engineered for speed, hardware flexibility, and efficient execution.
search_extension_payload.title: Local AI Inference Engine & Orchestrator - Cluaiz

search_extension_payload.snippet: Welcome to Cluaiz Local AI Engine. High-performance local AI inference engine. Hardware Agnostic Kernel v0.0.1. # CLUAIZ. Run advanced open models locally with complete privacy and industrial-grade precision.High-performance local AI inference engine. Cluaiz (pronounced cluiz) / (उच्चारण: क्लुएज़) is a high-performance local AI inference engine. Run advanced open models locally with complete privacy and industrial-grade precision. ## > QUICK INSTALLATION. Deploy the sovereign neural runtime natively with a single command. `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "irm https://cluaiz.com/install.ps1 | iex"`.
